posts.author: huysgt (HarryNg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just wanted to share a quick workaround we’ve been using on our team.

Since monday.com doesn’t let you customize board colors (like how they show up in the Dashboard/Calendar), we ran into some issues with readability, especially during screen shares or meetings.

We’re mostly on desktop using browsers, so we put together a little browser extension that lets us set the board display colors to something easier on the eyes.

It’s not fancy, but it helps. Thought I’d mention it here in case anyone else has the same pain point. Let me know if you’d find it useful too!
